I just saw that you sent this and I meant to tell you yesterday that I found your account that you already had with us so I put it under that one if its ok?

Also can I have your site contacts phone number just in case we need something once we are on site, and do you know which entrance we should be using when we come or should I just coordinate that with him?
I also talked to Todd about installing those FCO letters and he said we could do it for an additional $450.
He was asking though are they stud mount or VHB tape mount, and if its VHB do you have a cut out pattern for them?
Any other questions please just let me know, I will be heading out of the office early today but you can give me a call if you need anything.
SHIPPING & REMITTANCE ADDRESS: 8560 E. 30th St., Suite A Indianapolis, IN 46219
We'll do it this way...I originally billed him through my wrap company so we'll keep it under that company.

raw_facts.fact: I don’t have friends out here.
Been in Indianapolis and looking to make friends.
I’ve been in Indy for about 3 years now?
I don’t get out much (mom) but I won’t let that stop me ♥️😮‍💨
I was looking to see if anyone would like to form a nice, respectful group?
I’m open to: Book club, Bible Study, Crafts (Arts and craft), Hobbies (any welcome, I’m always up for a new experience), Hanging Out, Cooking, Singing and more!
I’m open to host at my home.
And please be open to hosting at your home as well.
This is my shot to get out there!
Introduce me to a new world 🌎.
Things I love 🌹 Bible study Jazz Cultures of all kind Crafts (Any, love panting) Karaoke (home and out) Scrapbooking Music of ALL kinds Fashion Flower arrangements Interior design Vision boards ASMR

raw_facts.fact: Subject: I need someone who can transport my things as I...
I am currently living in a recovery settings and on Friday moving downtown
I need someone who can transport my things as I don’t have a car.
There is no furniture it would be my clothing and personal items.
I can pay some money for the transportation and help.
I need to arrive by 10 AM at the latest.
I am starting a new life and do not have a lot of money.
To all the people offering to “help” for $150-$200 no thank you.
I don’t need my things moved. I can carry my own things. Just a ride.
